topics.title: Tense Mastery (Penguasaan Tense)
topics.description: Matriks 9 tense inti: Simple, Continuous, Perfect di Present, Past, Future, plus kata penanda waktu

questions.question: Waktu kalimat 'She writes reports every Monday' adalah...
questions.explanation: Simple Present. Verb + -s dengan penanda rutinitas 'every Monday' (kebiasaan/fakta umum).

questions.question: Lengkapi: 'Listen! She ___ now.'
questions.explanation: is singing — penanda 'Listen!' dan 'now' menuntut Present Continuous (is/am/are + V-ing).

questions.question: Lengkapi: 'They ___ here since 2019.'
questions.explanation: have lived — penanda 'since' selalu menuntut Present Perfect (have/has + V3).

questions.question: Lengkapi: 'We ___ TV when the phone rang.'
questions.explanation: were watching — Past Continuous: aksi sedang berlangsung saat diinterupsi aksi lain (rang).

questions.question: Lengkapi: 'By next year, she ___ her degree.'
questions.explanation: will have finished — Future Perfect (will have + V3): aksi selesai sebelum batas waktu di masa depan ('by').

questions.question: Rumus Present Perfect adalah...
questions.explanation: have/has + V3 (past participle). Contoh: 'She has written it.'

questions.question: Kalimat 'She had written it' termasuk tense...
questions.explanation: Past Perfect = had + V3. Menunjukkan aksi yang terjadi lebih dulu sebelum aksi lampau lainnya.

questions.question: Penanda 'since' dipakai untuk menunjukkan...
questions.explanation: since + titik waktu (since 2020). Untuk durasi pakai 'for' (for 3 years).

questions.question: Lengkapi: 'She ___ a letter at 8 PM yesterday.'
questions.explanation: was writing — Past Continuous: aksi sedang berlangsung pada waktu spesifik di masa lalu (at 8 PM).

questions.question: Untuk memindahkan tense continuous antar-waktu, yang diganti adalah...
options: kata kerja bantu (is → was → will be)
questions.explanation: Cukup ganti auxiliary-nya: is → was → will be. Pola be + V-ing tetap sama.

topics.title: Modal Verbs (Kata Kerja Bantu)
topics.description: can, could, may, might, must, have to, should, will/would — fungsi, kadar makna, dan jebakan

questions.question: Aturan emas modal adalah modal + ...
questions.explanation: modal + V1 — tanpa 'to', tanpa '-s'. ✗ he cans go  ✓ he can go.

questions.question: Lengkapi: 'Visitors ___ touch the paintings.' (larangan)
questions.explanation: mustn't — menyatakan larangan (dilarang). 'don't have to' berarti tidak wajib, beda makna.

questions.question: Lengkapi: 'She ___ be home; the lights are on.' (yakin ~95%)
questions.explanation: must — deduksi dengan keyakinan tinggi berdasarkan bukti (lampu menyala).

questions.question: Lengkapi: '___ you help me, please?' (permintaan sopan)
questions.explanation: Could — modal untuk permintaan yang sopan.

questions.question: Lengkapi: 'I ___ work today; it’s a company rule.'
questions.explanation: have to — keharusan yang berasal dari aturan/eksternal.

questions.question: Kalimat manakah yang SALAH?
questions.explanation: 'He cans go' salah — modal tidak pernah memakai -s. Benar: 'He can go'.

questions.question: Frasa 'don’t have to' berarti...
questions.explanation: don't have to = tidak wajib/boleh tidak. Berbeda dari 'mustn't' yang berarti dilarang.

questions.question: Untuk deduksi, lawan dari 'must' adalah...
questions.explanation: can't — menyatakan kemustahilan (~0%). 'must' (~95% yakin) lawannya 'can't', bukan 'mustn't'.

questions.question: Lengkapi: 'It ___ rain later.' (kemungkinan ~50%)
questions.explanation: might — kemungkinan sekitar 50% (bisa juga 'may').

questions.question: Lengkapi: 'You ___ wear a helmet.' (kewajiban kuat)
questions.explanation: must — keharusan kuat. 'might/could/may' justru menyatakan kemungkinan/izin.

topics.title: Conditionals (Kalimat Pengandaian)
topics.description: Type 0–3: dari fakta umum, kemungkinan nyata, khayalan sekarang, sampai penyesalan masa lalu

questions.question: Lengkapi: 'If I ___ you, I would apologize.'
questions.explanation: were — Conditional Type 2; ungkapan 'If I were you' memakai 'were' untuk semua subjek.

questions.question: Lengkapi: 'If you heat ice, it ___.'
questions.explanation: melts — Type 0 (fakta umum): if + present, present. Selalu benar.

questions.question: Lengkapi: 'If it rains, I ___ home.'
questions.explanation: will stay — Type 1 (kemungkinan nyata di masa depan): if + present, will + V1.

questions.question: Lengkapi: 'If she studied harder, she ___ the exam.'
questions.explanation: would pass — Type 2 (khayalan sekarang): if + past, would + V1.

questions.question: Lengkapi: 'If I had studied, I ___ the exam.'
questions.explanation: would have passed — Type 3 (penyesalan masa lalu): if + past perfect, would have + V3.

questions.question: Rumus Type 1 adalah: if + present, ___.
questions.explanation: will + V1 — Type 1 untuk kemungkinan nyata di masa depan.

questions.question: Conditional Type 3 mengungkapkan...
questions.explanation: Type 3 = penyesalan masa lalu. 'If I had studied, I would have passed' (faktanya tidak belajar).

questions.question: Aturan koma: jika klausa 'if' berada di DEPAN, maka...
questions.explanation: Pakai koma: 'If it rains, I will stay.' Jika 'if' di belakang, tanpa koma.

questions.question: Lengkapi: 'If water reaches 100°C, it ___.'
questions.explanation: boils — Type 0 (kebenaran ilmiah/fakta umum): present + present.

questions.question: Type 2 dipakai untuk situasi...
questions.explanation: Type 2 = khayalan/tak nyata di masa kini. 'If I had money, I would travel' (faktanya tidak punya).

topics.title: Passive Voice (Kalimat Pasif)
topics.description: Pola be + V3 di tiap tense; fokus pada objek/hasil saat pelaku tak penting atau dalam gaya formal

questions.question: Rumus dasar kalimat pasif adalah...
questions.explanation: be + V3 (past participle). Bentuk 'be' menyesuaikan tense.

questions.question: Lengkapi: 'The letter ___ last week.'
questions.explanation: was sent — pasif Past Simple: was/were + V3.

questions.question: Lengkapi: 'English ___ all over the world.'
questions.explanation: is spoken — pasif Present Simple: is/am/are + V3.

questions.question: Lengkapi: 'The book was ___ by him.'
questions.explanation: written — pasif selalu memakai V3 (past participle), bukan V2 'wrote'.

questions.question: Pasif Present Perfect: 'It ___ written.'
questions.explanation: has been — pasif Present Perfect: has/have been + V3.

questions.question: Ubah ke pasif: 'Someone cleans the office daily.' → 'The office ___ daily.'
questions.explanation: is cleaned — pasif Present Simple: is + V3.

questions.question: Kata 'by' dipakai dalam kalimat pasif ketika...
questions.explanation: 'by' dipakai hanya jika pelaku penting: 'Hamlet was written by Shakespeare.'

questions.question: Pasif dengan modal berpola: modal + ...
questions.explanation: modal + be + V3. Contoh: 'It must be written.'

questions.question: Kalimat pasif dipilih ketika kita ingin fokus pada...
questions.explanation: Pasif menonjolkan objek/hasil saat pelaku tak diketahui/tak penting, atau dalam gaya formal.

questions.question: Lengkapi: 'The bridge ___ in 1990.'
questions.explanation: was built — pasif Past Simple, menekankan objek (jembatan).

topics.title: Adjective Clause (Klausa Adjektiva)
topics.description: Relative pronoun who, whom, whose, which, that, where, when; defining vs non-defining

questions.question: Lengkapi: 'The woman ___ bag was lost cried.'
questions.explanation: whose — menyatakan kepemilikan (tasnya milik si wanita).

questions.question: Lengkapi: 'The man ___ called is my boss.'
questions.explanation: who — subjek berupa orang. 'which' hanya untuk benda/hewan.

questions.question: Lengkapi: 'The book ___ I read is interesting.'
questions.explanation: which — menerangkan benda (buku).

questions.question: Relative pronoun untuk menerangkan TEMPAT adalah...
questions.explanation: where — untuk tempat. Contoh: 'The town where I live...'

questions.question: Lengkapi (non-defining): 'My brother, ___ lives in Bali, is a doctor.'
questions.explanation: who — orang. Pada klausa non-defining 'that' tidak boleh dipakai.

questions.question: Lengkapi: 'Paris, ___ is in France, is lovely.'
questions.explanation: which — ada koma → non-defining, dan 'that' tidak boleh dipakai.

questions.question: Ciri klausa non-defining adalah...
options: diapit koma & tidak boleh pakai that
questions.explanation: Non-defining memberi info tambahan, diapit koma, dan tidak boleh memakai 'that'.

questions.question: Lengkapi (objek, formal): 'The man ___ I met is kind.'
questions.explanation: whom — relative pronoun untuk orang sebagai objek (gaya formal).

questions.question: Reduksi yang benar dari 'The man who is standing' adalah...
questions.explanation: Buang 'who + be': 'The man who is standing' → 'The man standing'.

questions.question: Lengkapi: 'That’s the house ___ I grew up.'
questions.explanation: where — menerangkan tempat (rumah tempat tumbuh besar).

topics.title: Reported Speech (Kalimat Tidak Langsung)
topics.description: Backshift tense satu langkah, pergeseran kata ganti & waktu, melaporkan pertanyaan dan perintah

questions.question: Lengkapi: 'She said she ___ busy that day.'
questions.explanation: was — backshift: present (is) mundur satu langkah menjadi past (was).

questions.question: Dalam backshift, present perfect mundur menjadi...
questions.explanation: present perfect → past perfect. '...he had finished.'

questions.question: Dalam reported speech, 'now' berubah menjadi...
questions.explanation: now → then. Keterangan waktu ikut bergeser.

questions.question: Dalam reported speech, 'tomorrow' berubah menjadi...
questions.explanation: tomorrow → the next day. (today → that day, yesterday → the day before).

questions.question: Dalam backshift, modal 'will' berubah menjadi...
questions.explanation: will → would. (can → could, may → might).

questions.question: Dalam backshift, 'must' berubah menjadi...
questions.explanation: must → had to. '...he had to leave.'

questions.question: Lengkapi (perintah): 'He told me ___ down.'
questions.explanation: to sit — melaporkan perintah: tell/ask + (object) + to + V1.

questions.question: Melaporkan pertanyaan yes/no memakai...
questions.explanation: Pertanyaan yes/no dilaporkan dengan 'if' atau 'whether', tanpa inversi.

questions.question: Lengkapi: 'He said he ___ working.'
questions.explanation: was — present continuous (is working) mundur menjadi past continuous (was working).

questions.question: Larangan: 'Don’t go' dilaporkan menjadi 'He told me ___ go.'
questions.explanation: not to — larangan dalam reported command: tell/ask + object + not to + V1.

topics.title: Gerund & Infinitive
topics.description: Kapan memakai V-ing vs to + V1, kata kerja yang mengikuti masing-masing, dan makna yang berubah

questions.question: Lengkapi: 'I enjoy ___ novels.'
questions.explanation: reading — 'enjoy' selalu diikuti gerund (V-ing).

questions.question: Lengkapi: 'She decided ___ early.'
questions.explanation: to leave — 'decide' selalu diikuti infinitive (to + V1).

questions.question: Lengkapi: 'I can’t stand ___ in line.'
questions.explanation: waiting — 'can't stand' diikuti gerund.

questions.question: Setelah preposition, kita selalu memakai...
questions.explanation: Setelah preposition selalu gerund: 'good at swimming', 'interested in learning'.

questions.question: Sebagai subjek kalimat, bentuk yang dipakai adalah...
questions.explanation: Gerund sebagai subjek: 'Smoking is bad for your health.'

questions.question: Lengkapi (artinya: berhenti merokok): 'He stopped ___.'
questions.explanation: smoking — stop + V-ing = berhenti melakukannya. 'stop + to V' berarti berhenti UNTUK melakukan hal lain.

questions.question: Lengkapi (jangan lupa, belum dilakukan): 'Remember ___ the door.'
questions.explanation: to lock — remember + to V = ingat untuk melakukan (belum). remember + V-ing = ingat sudah melakukan.

questions.question: Kata kerja manakah yang diikuti GERUND?
questions.explanation: avoid + gerund. (want/decide/hope diikuti infinitive).

questions.question: Lengkapi: 'I’m interested in ___ English.'
questions.explanation: learning — setelah preposition 'in' selalu gerund.

questions.question: Lengkapi: 'She wants ___ a doctor.'
questions.explanation: to be — 'want' selalu diikuti infinitive (to + V1).

topics.title: Comparison (Perbandingan)
topics.description: Comparative & superlative berdasarkan suku kata, bentuk tak beraturan, dan pola as...as / the...the

questions.question: Lengkapi: 'It’s ___ film I’ve ever seen.'
questions.explanation: the best — superlative (di antara semua film), memakai 'the'.

questions.question: Lengkapi: 'Today is ___ than yesterday.'
questions.explanation: hotter — comparative kata 1 suku kata + than. ✗ 'more hot'.

questions.question: Comparative dari 'beautiful' adalah...
questions.explanation: more beautiful — kata 2+ suku kata memakai 'more' (bukan -er).

questions.question: Comparative dari 'good' adalah...
questions.explanation: better — bentuk tak beraturan: good → better → best.

questions.question: Lengkapi (setara): 'She is ___ tall ___ her sister.'
questions.explanation: as ... as — menyatakan dua hal yang setara/sama.

questions.question: Superlative dari 'happy' adalah...
questions.explanation: the happiest — akhiran -y berubah jadi -iest.

questions.question: Bentuk manakah yang SALAH?
questions.explanation: 'more taller' salah — jangan menggabungkan dobel comparative. Cukup 'taller'.

questions.question: Lengkapi: 'The more you study, ___.'
questions.explanation: Pola 'the ... , the ...': dua hal naik bersamaan. 'The more you study, the smarter you get.'

questions.question: Comparative dari 'bad' adalah...
questions.explanation: worse — bentuk tak beraturan: bad → worse → worst.

questions.question: Bentuk comparative selalu diikuti kata...
questions.explanation: than — 'more interesting than that one'.

topics.title: Causative (Kalimat Penyebab)
topics.description: have, get, make, let — menyuruh, memesan jasa, memaksa, atau mengizinkan orang lain melakukan sesuatu

questions.question: Lengkapi: 'I had my car ___ yesterday.'
questions.explanation: repaired — pola jasa: have/get + benda + V3 (orang lain yang mengerjakan).

questions.question: Lengkapi: 'She made me ___.'
questions.explanation: cry — make + orang + V1 (tanpa 'to').

questions.question: Lengkapi: 'I got him ___ me.'
questions.explanation: to help — hanya 'get' yang butuh 'to': get + orang + to V.

questions.question: Kata causative manakah yang berarti 'mengizinkan'?
questions.explanation: let — memberi izin/kebebasan. 'make' justru berarti memaksa.

questions.question: Lengkapi: 'They let me ___.'
questions.explanation: go — let + orang + V1 (tanpa 'to').

questions.question: Causative manakah yang membutuhkan 'to'?
questions.explanation: get — hanya 'get' yang butuh 'to'. have/make/let langsung memakai bentuk dasar.

questions.question: Lengkapi: 'I had John ___ my car.'
questions.explanation: repair — have + orang + V1: 'I had John repair my car.'

questions.question: Kata 'make' dalam causative mengandung nuansa...
questions.explanation: make = memaksa (tak ada pilihan). 'She made me cry.'

questions.question: Pola jasa yang paling sering dipakai adalah have/get + benda + ...
questions.explanation: have/get + benda + V3: 'I had my hair cut.'

questions.question: Lengkapi: 'She got her phone ___.'
questions.explanation: fixed — get + benda + V3 (orang lain yang memperbaiki).

topics.title: Question Tags
topics.description: Prinsip berlawanan (positif→negatif), auxiliary yang sama, dan pengecualian yang sering diuji

questions.question: Lengkapi: 'You are coming, ___?'
questions.explanation: aren't you — kalimat positif diberi tag negatif dengan auxiliary yang sama (are).

questions.question: Lengkapi: 'She doesn’t like it, ___?'
questions.explanation: does she — kalimat negatif diberi tag positif (does).

questions.question: Lengkapi: 'They went home, ___?'
questions.explanation: didn't they — kalimat past tanpa auxiliary memakai did.

questions.question: Lengkapi: 'He can swim, ___?'
questions.explanation: can't he — pakai modal yang sama (can) dalam bentuk negatif.

questions.question: Lengkapi: 'You have finished, ___?'
questions.explanation: haven't you — perfect memakai auxiliary 'have'.

questions.question: Lengkapi: 'Let’s take a break, ___?'
questions.explanation: shall we — ajakan 'Let's' selalu memakai tag 'shall we?'.

questions.question: Lengkapi (perintah): 'Open the door, ___?'
questions.explanation: will you — kalimat perintah diberi tag 'will you?'.

questions.question: Lengkapi: 'I am late, ___?'
questions.explanation: aren't I — pengecualian khusus untuk 'I am' (bukan 'amn't I').

questions.question: Lengkapi: 'She never lies, ___?'
questions.explanation: does she — kata 'never' membuat kalimat dianggap negatif, jadi tag-nya positif.

questions.question: Lengkapi (tanpa auxiliary): 'You like tea, ___?'
questions.explanation: don't you — tanpa auxiliary, pakai do/does/did.
